subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, Who hath sent forth the Messengers and revealed the Books - verily, there is no God but Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی ارسل الرسل و انزل الکتب علی انه لا اله الا هو
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause, @prayer for protection, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
